name: Marguerite Diel
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton female wearing lower-class clothing - a collared shirt, breeches, and rough leather shoes.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: adept, secretive, cultist, sleeper agent, assassin, hostile
Role: Marguerite Diel is an adept with a deep, dark secret - she is a Mythic Dawn sleeper agent. She appears after certain events along with Styrbjorn with orders to find and kill targets in the Imperial City. She knows the standard Mythic Dawn Bound Armor and Mace spell, a Mythic Dawn summon spell (Scamp, Clannfear, or Daedroth), a major shield spell, and a minor shock damage spell. She carries a small amount of gold and vanishes when the Oblivion Crisis is resolved.
Home Location Information: The All-Saints Inn in the Imperial City's Temple District, where she stays while carrying out her mission.
Daily Routine: [As a quest-specific hostile NPC with orders to hunt targets, specific routine unavailable]
Personality - The Hidden Assassin: Marguerite maintains a façade as an ordinary inn guest while secretly serving as a Mythic Dawn assassin. She works alongside Styrbjorn to eliminate enemies of the cult, using her magical abilities and summoned Daedra to carry out her deadly mission in the Imperial City.
author: Bethesda
